L1.head: receptor's intrinsic flexibility
L1.claim: The interplay between receptor's intrinsic flexibility and lipid raft modulation governs GPCR conformational dynamics

L1.head: interplay between receptor's intrinsic flexibility and allosteric modulation by lipid rafts
L1.claim: This interplay dynamically regulates GPCR conformational states

L2.head: unique lipid composition of lipid rafts
L2.claim: Lipid raft composition drives formation of specific GPCR conformations

L2.head: distinct conformational states of GPCRs
L2.claim: Different conformations alter ligand/drug binding characteristics

L3.head: raft-induced conformational changes
L3.claim: Conformational shifts reveal previously unknown allosteric sites

L3.head: exposed allosteric binding sites
L3.claim: Identified sites allow targeted drug design with improved specificity

L3.head: highly specific drugs
L3.claim: Targeting new allosteric sites enhances therapeutic efficacy

L3.head: advanced biophysical techniques (smFRET)
L3.claim: Single-molecule FRET enables real-time monitoring of GPCR dynamics

L3.head: direct observation of conformational changes
L3.claim: Structural insights guide identification of novel allosteric modulators
